results.term: Hello, I've been really depressed lately and feel ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Hello, I've been really depressed lately and feel like there isn't anything I can do to break this feeling.

results.term: November before Covid started I was diagnoses with...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: November before Covid started I was diagnoses with CRPS (its a nerve issue that causes immense pain) and had to stop doing my activities like dance, then when Covid hit last March and we all had to isolate I have not been able to interact with people outside my immediate family.

results.term: I know I'm not alone and that's what makes it hard...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I know I'm not alone and that's what makes it hard to reach out, because I don't want people to think that I think my problems are worse then there's.  It just seems like everyone was happy to find different ways to stay in touch when the lockdown all first started but the longer it goes on the less everyone seems to be trying to connect.

results.term: I just don't know what to do about it anymore

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I just don't know what to do about it anymore

results.term: Yes, I don't like to bother others or let other pe...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes, I don't like to bother others or let other people down

results.term: It is a lot, I'm used to being the person that eve...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: It is a lot, I'm used to being the person that everyone comes to for help, but I am not very good at asking for help myself.  I have seen a doctor and they started my new medicine regimen but unfortunately there is no cure for this disease.  I was going to physical therapy but finished that right as Covid started.

results.term: Plus it does get better as the weather gets warmer...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Plus it does get better as the weather gets warmer so the winter has been hard, really looking forward to spring and summer for a little relief

results.term: I'd be open to doing Yoga once things open back up...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I'd be open to doing Yoga once things open back up, but having this disease puts me in a high risk category so my interaction outside the home still has to remain limited until we develop some heard immunity.

results.term: I'm hoping to get out and go for walks once the we...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I'm hoping to get out and go for walks once the weather warms up, unfortunately right now there is still some snow on the ground and it's not quite warn yet being in the northeast

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I did take walks along the path in our development last summer so the cabin fever wasn't as bad as it seems to be with all the snow that basically kept me inside all of february
